claims.evidence_text: At harvest, there is little that can be done to limit PHS besides harvesting as soon as possible, although PHS can occur prior to harvest maturity... Pre-emptive strategies at seeding can help avoid maturation under conducive conditions and mitigate risk.
claims.claim_summary: Pre-harvest sprouting risk is mitigated by harvesting as soon as possible and by pre-emptive seeding strategies that avoid maturation under conducive (wet) conditions.

claims.evidence_text: The Falling Number test is used to determine whether the levels of α-amylase are acceptable... Low FN indicates elevated a-amylase. Falling Number Index 2-3 Susceptible 5-6 Mod. Resistant
claims.claim_summary: Falling Number test measures alpha-amylase; low Falling Number indicates pre-harvest sprouting damage and elevated alpha-amylase.

claims.evidence_text: Maximum grain weight Harvestable grain moisture Changes during maturationdrying
claims.claim_summary: Grain moisture declines during maturation drying; maximum grain weight is reached around the point grain becomes harvestable.
